name: Snow Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon grated lemon or orange rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Make a depression in the center and pour in the milk, butter, and grated rind.
3. Stir slightly.
4. Add snow and raisins. Stir only until dry ingredients disappear.
5. Spoon batter into 12 buttered muffin cups, filling two-thirds full.
6. Bake at 400°F for 15 to 18 minutes.
7. Serve hot with butter or strawberry preserves. Clean frost scraped from a freezer may be used instead of snow.
